title: grammitis marginalis
intro: Grammitis marginalis, also known as the margin grass fern or chain fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Grammitis marginalis include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested in moderation under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
